violations.description: Preventing contamination from equipment, utensils, and wiping cloths. — --Cloth for wiping food spills was not stored in sanitizing solution (at proper concentration) between uses. -Wet cloth left at espresso machine countr between uses and stated as changed approximately 2 times per day.--In-use utensil was not properly stored during pauses in food preparation or dispensing. -2 coffee powderscoops with handles in product.

Handwashing lavatories. — --Handwashing lavatory was not provided in sufficient number and/or not accessible to allow convenient use by employees. -Gallon waste water jug in hand sink upon arrival. *COS-moved to wash basin while on-site.

Cleaning frequency of equipment and utensils. — --Nonfood contact surface was not cleaned as frequently as required. -Chemicals/containers/mat below dish pit have splatter and debris build up. -Some residue at refrigerator door shelves. -Residue at interior bottom edges of cabinets.

Handwashing lavatories. — --Handwashing lavatory was not provided in sufficient number and/or not accessible to allow convenient use by employees. -Cold brew pitcher in hand sink basin. COS-moved to wash sink basin.

Use of poisonous and toxic materials. — --Poisonous or toxic material was not used and/or applied according to manufacturer's label. -Pre-made chlorine sanitizer found at 200ppm Chlorine. *Solution for dishwash should be 50ppm and solution for tabletops should be 100ppm.
Designed, constructed, installed, and maintained (1 pt deducted)
Cleaning frequency, maintained clean (1 pt deducted)
Thermometers provided, used, clean, and accurate (1 pt deducted)
Properly designed, located, constructed, operated, maintained, cleaned and chemical test kit provided (2 pts deducted)
Handwashing, good hygienic practices (5 pts deducted)
Clean, proper use, storage, sanitizing solution (2 pts deducted)
Cleaning frequency, maintained clean (1 pt deducted)
Properly designed, located, constructed, operated, maintained, cleaned and chemical test kit provided (2 pts deducted)
